name: Hayes Beer Distributing
message: Founded in 1956, Hayes Beer Distributing is one of the leading distributors of a large variety of beers in Chicago. It offers more than 100 brands of beer, including Blue Moon, Bohemia, Buckler, Carta Blanca, Corona Light, Fosters Bitter, Hacker-Pschorr and Miller Lite. The company also provides beer from brands, such as Pacifico, Red Dog, Verdi, Tsingtao, Tecate, Steel Reserve and Molson Canadian.
